children.heading: Congressional statement of purpose
children.label: a Congressional statement of purpose
children.text: It is the purpose of this part to improve the efficiency of electric motors and pumps and certain other industrial equipment in order to conserve the energy resources of the Nation.

children.heading: Inclusion of industrial equipment as covered equipment
children.label: b Inclusion of industrial equipment as covered equipment
children.text: The Secretary may, by rule, include a type of industrial equipment as covered equipment if he determines that to do so is necessary to carry out the purposes of this part.

children.heading: Inclusion of component parts of consumer products as industrial equipment
children.label: c Inclusion of component parts of consumer products as industrial equipment

children.text: such articles are, to a significant extent, distributed in commerce other than as component parts for consumer products; and
such articles meet the requirements of (other than clauses (ii) and (iii)).section 6311(2)(A) of this title
